title: More Swords+
description: This Forge Mod Adds Diffrent Types OF sword In The World Of Minecraft
body:
**_RECIPIES ARE NOT YET ADDED BUT YOU CAN GET THROUGH COMMANDS_** 


This Forge 1.21.1 mod introduces a small but well-designed set of three unique swords, each tied to a classic Minecraft element. The focus is not excess content, but usefulness, balance, and clear progression—the way good mods have always been made.

### Apple Sword

A sword crafted with an enchanted apple core, designed for survival efficiency.

Grants Saturation while held

Ideal for long mining sessions and early-game survival

Reduces food management without breaking game balance

Lightweight and practical, not overpowered

### Lava Sword

Forged using lava-infused materials, built for hostile environments.

Grants Fire Resistance while held

Perfect for Nether exploration and lava-heavy combat

Encourages traditional risk-reward gameplay

Fits naturally into vanilla progression

### Ice Sword

A cold-forged blade powered by frozen energy.

Grants Water Breathing while held

Designed for ocean exploration and underwater structures

Supports exploration without bypassing challenge

Complements existing water mechanics

### Mod Philosophy

Simple content, clear purpose

No unnecessary mechanics or clutter

Vanilla-friendly design

Fully compatible with Minecraft Forge 1.21.1
